title: SEC, NGX Engage Pan-Atlantic University Students on Investor Education - FinancialEDGE
description: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX) have collaborated to educate students of Pan-Atlantic University on the importance of investing in the capital market. As part of activities marking the 2024 Investor Week, the SEC Director-General, Dr. Emomotimi Agama, led a team to the university to sensitize students on the
html: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX) have collaborated to educate students of Pan-Atlantic University on the importance of investing in the capital market.
